user.title: Connect to your Zephyr account
user.description: Enter the credentials you use in the Zephyr mobile app.

data_description.username: The email address you registered with in the Zephyr app.

data_description.thing_name: Select the range hood you want to add to Home Assistant.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate with Zephyr
reauth_confirm.description: Your session has expired. Please re-enter your password.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the Zephyr cloud. Please check your internet connection and try again.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid email address or password. Please check your credentials and try again.
error.no_devices: No Zephyr range hoods found on this account. Make sure your hood is registered in the Zephyr app.

abort.already_configured: This range hood is already set up in Home Assistant.

init.title: Backend overrides
init.description: These values are compiled in from reverse-engineering the Zephyr app and are the same for all users. Only change them if Zephyr has updated their backend infrastructure.

data_description.iot_endpoint: AWS IoT Core hostname used for MQTT device control.
data_description.gemteks_base_url: Base URL for the Gemteks REST API (device discovery and status).
data_description.cognito_user_pool_id: AWS Cognito User Pool ID (e.g. us-west-2_XXXXXXXXX).
data_description.cognito_identity_pool_id: AWS Cognito Identity Pool ID for obtaining temporary AWS credentials.
